scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace web/app"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace web/app && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace web/app && npm run lint --workspace @bluetasks/server
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @bluetasks/app && npm run test --workspace @bluetasks/server
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace @bluetasks/app && npm run test:coverage --workspace @bluetasks/server
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run duplicates && npm run test:coverage && npm run build
